subdirectories.name: assets
subdirectories.description: Stores all static assets such as images, videos, and fonts.

subdirectories.name: components
subdirectories.description: Contains reusable React components for the application.

subdirectories.name: data
subdirectories.description: Holds datasets, API endpoints, and local storage configurations.

subdirectories.name: services
subdirectories.description: Includes all service logic such as data fetching, authentication, and business rules.

subdirectories.name: styles
subdirectories.description: Centralizes CSS, SCSS, or styled-components for consistent styling across the application.

subdirectories.name: utils
subdirectories.description: Contains utility functions and helper scripts used throughout the project.

core_modules.name: EvidenceGate
core_modules.description: The main entry point of the application, presenting the interactive 3D narrative.

core_modules.name: EvidenceFilter
core_modules.description: A module responsible for filtering and presenting market evidence to users.

core_modules.name: DecisionMaker
core_modules.description: Handles the decision-making process based on filtered evidence, providing risk-aware recommendations.

core_modules.name: UserInterface
core_modules.description: Manages user interactions, controls, and display elements.

core_modules.name: Authentication
core_modules.description: Manages user authentication, including login, logout, and session management.

additional_modules.name: DataVisualization
additional_modules.description: Includes components for visualizing market data in 3D and other formats.

additional_modules.name: RiskAssessment
additional_modules.description: Provides tools and algorithms to assess and mitigate risks based on evidence.

additional_modules.name: UserPreferences
additional_modules.description: Handles user settings, preferences, and customization options.
